owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. Next bounded gap: verify the SNC presentation parity contract so the branded companion surface keeps its dark owner-facing identity without regressing to generic Windows defaults.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: SNC presentation parity is the next bounded verification gap; verify the branded tray icon and dark owner-facing style contract remains wired through resources, tray, and status surfaces.

chunks.title: Verify SNC presentation parity contract
chunks.goal: Confirm the branded SNC icon and dark owner-facing presentation contract remain wired through the tray/status surfaces instead of falling back to generic Windows defaults.
acceptance: The tray resource references the branded SNC icon rather than the generic application icon.
The main companion surface continues to use the dark branded style language from SNC_UI_STYLE_GUIDE.md.
Primary owner-facing presentation does not regress to a generic white Windows dialog style.
